title: Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962
summary: Section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962, as amended (19 U.S.C. §1862), allows the President to impose restrictions on goods imports or enter into negotiations with trading partners if the U.S. Secretary of Commerce determines, following an investigation, that the quantity or other circumstance of those imports “threaten[s] to impair” U.S. national security. Sec. 232 is one of several statutes under which...

title: National Park Service: FY2027 Appropriations
summary: The National Park Service (NPS) administers the National Park System, which includes 433 units valued for their natural, cultural, and recreational importance. System lands cover 81 million federal acres and 4 million nonfederal acres.
